name: Web Intents
description: Declarative profiles for application-wide UX/UI behavior (e.g., density, motion, interaction models) that components automatically adhere to.
summary: Declarative profiles for app-wide UX behavior (density, motion) that components adhere to.
tierEvidence: benchmarkCoverage covers motion-tokens (intent:motion), typography-scale (intent:typography), and responsive-adaptive (intent:density/breakpoint) — the application-wide UX-profile axes every benchmark design system exposes as theme/density/motion props.
